data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of no permanent event type clutter.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the system does not create permanent event types, specifically in the context of generating temporary booking links. While the linked use case describes the generation of a temporary link for a one-off meeting, there is no explicit evidence confirming that this link does not lead to the creation of a permanent event type. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the expiration of the temporary link and its implications on event types leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the temporary booking link does not create a permanent event type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the absence of permanent event types.
